title: lastrea novaeana
intro: Lastrea novaeana, also known as the New Guinea fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Lastrea novaeana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
